---
title: "Full Page Check"
filters:
  - quarto-exercises
quarto-exercises:
  check-mode: page
  score: true
  reveal: false
  reset: true
---

This page uses one Check Page button. Each question keeps its own options and point value.

## Ringbearer (2 points)

::: {.exercise data-testid="page-ring" points=2 shuffle=true}
Who carried the One Ring out of the Shire?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Frodo Baggins
:::

::: {.answer}
Boromir
:::
:::

## Fellowship (3 points)

::: {.exercise data-testid="page-fellowship" points=3 reveal=false}
Select all hobbits in the Fellowship.

::: {.answer correct=true}
Frodo Baggins
:::

::: {.answer correct=true}
Samwise Gamgee
:::

::: {.answer}
Legolas Greenleaf
:::
:::

## Inline answer (1 point)

::: {.exercise data-testid="page-blank" points=1}
The wizard who guides the Fellowship is [`Gandalf`]{.blank answer="Gandalf"}.
:::
